notes: Ride freshness window 10s -> 30s. Riders reported the device still falling back to IDLE during a brief phone-screen-lock even after the v2.2.4 widening, meaning the phone goes silent for longer than expected when backgrounded. 30 s tolerates that gap so the HUD stays usable while the iOS-side BLE-in-background path is fully sorted. Trade-off: when the rider really parks and walks away, the device holds RIDING for up to 30 s before transitioning to SUMMARY → IDLE — acceptable for now.
